creator: Alan@Wave2.co.uk
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	jawstats
#	jawstats/files
#	jawstats/files/pkg-message.in
#	jawstats/Makefile
#	jawstats/pkg-descr
#	jawstats/distinfo
#	jawstats/pkg-plist
#
echo c - jawstats
mkdir -p jawstats > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - jawstats/files
mkdir -p jawstats/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - jawstats/files/pkg-message.in
sed 's/^X//' >jawstats/files/pkg-message.in << 'a0baa17caf4687142e8e50073bff246c'
X
XJAWStats has been installed into %%WWWDIR%%
X
XPlease make sure AWStats is already installed and working on your server.
XJAWStats will not function without it.
X
XTo get started head over to the JAWStats website (http://www.jawstats.com/docs)
Xfor details on configuration.
a0baa17caf4687142e8e50073bff246c
echo x - jawstats/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >jawstats/Makefile << 'f443dae59cb23bf52ac3e950eef313c3'
X# New ports collection makefile for:    jawstats
X# Date created:                         14 November 2008
X# Whom:                                 Alan Snelson <alan@wave2.org>
X
XPORTNAME=	jawstats
XPORTVERSION=	0.6beta
XCATEGORIES=	www
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.jawstats.com/src/archive/
X
XMAINTAINER=	Alan@Wave2.org
XCOMMENT=	JAWStats is a Free Web Site Statistics tool
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=    awstats>=6.8:${PORTSDIR}/www/awstats\
X
XNO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
XNO_BUILD=	yes
XUSE_PHP=	yes
XWANT_PHP_WEB=   yes
XDEFAULT_PHP_VER=5
XSUB_FILES=	pkg-message
XPKGMESSAGE=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
X
Xdo-install:
X	${MKDIR} ${WWWDIR}
X	(cd ${WRKSRC}/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${WWWDIR})
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
f443dae59cb23bf52ac3e950eef313c3
echo x - jawstats/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >jawstats/pkg-descr << '29b071379d68a503122a0e8a18900e6a'
XJAWStats is a free site statistics and analytics package.
XIt runs in conjunction with AWStats and produces clear and informative charts,
Xgraphs and tables about your website visitors.
X
XWWW: http://www.jawstats.com
29b071379d68a503122a0e8a18900e6a
echo x - jawstats/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >jawstats/distinfo << 'e6785b76a346eafd133d09b87223caf6'
XMD5 (jawstats-0.6beta.tar.gz) = 6bd9a2b812ed398adbd1e7211ffd885c
XSHA256 (jawstats-0.6beta.tar.gz) = cc107dcb559c29eeb28c8c3a32a712a2fa03bf1f29238f762b2e59749c14cfe3
XSIZE (jawstats-0.6beta.tar.gz) = 234467
e6785b76a346eafd133d09b87223caf6
echo x - jawstats/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >jawstats/pkg-plist << 'af6f8fc9dfd881ad75c176f7424438d1'
